subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-01-21
subcodes.first_line: The likeness of Iran is as a verdant and fertile field that hath been seized by bitter cold, and upon which abundant snow hath descended [3.5s]... ...Once a trading caravan from Mecca was passing through Syrian lands. The Egyptian king ordered that the leader of the expedition
subcodes.first_line_orig: مثل ایران مثل حاصل سبز و خرم خوبی است که گرفتار برودت شده و برف فراوان بروی آن فرود آمده باشد... وقتی که کاروان مکه وارد بریه الشام
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @past, present and future of Iran, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
